name: recoverable-agent-runtime
description: Recoverable Agent Runtime — durable execution and recovery reference platform

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @rar/domain && npm run build -w @rar/db && npm run build -w @rar/acp && npm run build -w @rar/evidence && npm run build -w @rar/o11y && npm run build -w @rar/testkit
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @rar/api && npm run build -w @rar/worker && npm run build -w @rar/providers && npm run build -w @rar/dashboard
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify:ship: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run migrate && npm run seed && npm test && npm run demo:payment-crash
